Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce merged log chronological order reasoning Need to match events Lets list events

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Log A events 1 2023 10 10T10 00 00Z Order Received 2 2023 10 10T10 01 30Z Order Validated 3 2023 10 10T10 02 00Z Payment Processed 4 2023 10 10T10 05 00Z Item Shipped 5 2023 10 10T10 20 00Z Item Delivered Log B events 1 2023 10 10T09 59 58Z OrderReceived similar to Order Received likely same event

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Timestamp 2 seconds earlier Use tolerance less than 2 sec so this matches event 1 Combine attributes user id u45 resource id r10 notes Event captured at warehouse system

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2023 10 10T10 01 29Z OrderValidation matches Log A Order Validated 10 01 30 Difference 1 sec So merge Include user id u12 resource id r10 notes Cross check inventory

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: 2023 10 10T10 02 05Z PaymentCheck matches Payment Processed 10 02 00 Difference 5 sec still within 2 sec tolerance Actually tolerance 2 seconds 5 sec greater than 2 so maybe not considered same But they are likely same activity

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The spec says if timestamps differ by less than 2 seconds consider them the same 5 sec greater than 2 So we cannot confidently match

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2023 10 10T10 03 00Z Quality Check not present in Log A So we keep separate

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2023 10 10T10 05 02Z Shipping matches Item Shipped 10 05 00 Difference 2 sec Within tolerance 2 sec So merge

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets create a table We will choose primary timestamp as the Log A timestamp for consistency but include both timestamps for merged events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Payment Processed Log A 10 02 00Z and PaymentCheck Log B 10 02 05Z Since they are not within 2 sec we treat as separate events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Quality Check Log B 10 03 00Z Not in Log A Keep separate

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Item Delivered Log A 10 20 00Z No matching event in Log B So keep as separate

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Now we need to order chronologically based on primary timestamps Lets list final merged events in order Order Received merged Order Validation merged Payment Processed Log A PaymentCheck Log B Quality Check Log B Item Shipped merged Item Delivered Log A
